title: UNDERWATER SOFT ROBOTIC SYSTEM
what: Full-stack architecture and development of an underwater robotic system
Compliant actuator design, chassis development, and sensor/electronics integration
how: Compliant materials design and dynamic characterization
Subtractive manufacturing as primary fabrication technique
ROS2-based control software and sensor integration
Systematic testing protocols across operating and transitioning media
results: Expected: novel underwater gait behavior characterization and robotic architecture validation across fluid media
Ongoing: autonomous gait behavior testing; full-system integration from mechanics to software stack
